name: @aipehub/example-im-steward-bridge
description: v5 Stream SW Phase D — reach the hub steward (管家) from an IM client. An IM bridge forks the router with a steward vocabulary (`/steward <plain text>` → plan, `/apply <n>` → apply) routed to a plan/apply StewardPort (mirroring `MeHubStewardSurface`), NOT `hub.dispatch`. Tier badges come from the REAL `classifyStewardAction`, so dangerous / cross-hub asks honestly park to the approval inbox and an async notify-back tells the user once they resolve it in `/me`.
